name: pinnedai-vscode
displayName: pinnedai — Stop your AI coder from repeating bugs
description: Pinned finds AI-prone failure patterns in your repo and turns them into regression guards. This extension shows the live Pinned status bar (how many guards are active, what was just caught) and adds command-palette shortcuts for the local `pinned` CLI. Works in VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any VS Code-family editor.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Pinned reads .registry.json and shells out to the local `pinned` binary you installed. It does not execute repository code.

pinnedai.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the Pinned status item in the bottom status bar.

pinnedai.statusBar.refreshIntervalSecond.description: How often (in seconds) to refresh the status bar. Defaults to 10s.

pinnedai.binaryPath.description: Path to the pinned binary. Leave empty to use 'pinned' from PATH, the workspace's node_modules/pinnedai, or 'npx pinnedai' as fallback.

scripts.build: tsup src/extension.ts --format cjs --target node18 --out-dir dist --shims --clean --external vscode
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run publish:ovsx && pnpm run publish:vsce
